thread.title: Minister Harjit S. Sajjan and Parliamentary Secretary Taleeb Noormohamed to announce tax break for all Canadians - Canada.ca
thread.title_full: Minister Harjit S. Sajjan and Parliamentary Secretary Taleeb Noormohamed to announce tax break for all Canadians - Canada.ca

author: Pacific Economic Development Canada
title: Minister Harjit S. Sajjan and Parliamentary Secretary Taleeb Noormohamed to announce tax break for all Canadians - Canada.ca
text:
From: Pacific Economic Development Canada
Media advisory The Honourable Harjit S. Sajjan, President of the King’s Privy Council for Canada, Minister of Emergency Preparedness and Minister responsible for the Pacific Economic Development Agency of Canada, alongside Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of Canadian Heritage, Taleeb Noormohamed, will make an announcement that will put more money in your pocket, so you can buy the things you need and save for the things you want.
November 22, 2024 – Vancouver, British Columbia
The Honourable Harjit S. Sajjan, Minister of Emergency Preparedness and Minister responsible for the Pacific Economic Development Agency of Canada, alongside Taleeb Noormohamed, Parliamentary Secretary to the Minister of Canadian Heritage, will make an announcement that will put more money in your pocket, so you can buy the things you need and save for the things you want.
Date: Sunday, November 24, 2024
Time: 10:00 am
Location: The Granville Island Toy Company
 3298 Main Street
 Vancouver, B.C.
Contacts Joanna Kanga
Press Secretary
Office of Minister Sajjan
Joanna.kanga@kpc-cpr.gc.ca
Lynsey Brothers
A/Communications Manager
PacifiCan
lynsey.brothers@pacifican.gc.ca
